title: Jaden's Nether Expansion Wood Compat
description: This adds compat for nether-like woods from other mods for the Unique Nether Wood resource pack that JNE has.
body: This resource pack adds compat for nether-like woods from other mods for the **Unique Nether Wood** resource pack that JNE has. Woods supported as of now are: **Soulblight** from Gardens of the Dead & **Fright** from Soulful Nether.
